pkgmetadata.longdescription:
Bun is a fast all-in-one JavaScript runtime and toolkit. It bundles a JavaScript/TypeScript transpiler, npm-compatible package manager, bundler, and Node.js-compatible runtime into a single executable. Built with Zig and JavaScriptCore, it focuses on performance and developer experience.
NOTE: Building from source requires LLVM 21 (exact version), Zig (auto-downloaded), Go, Rust, and bootstraps via bun-bin. This ebuild is a skeleton for future development. Use dev-lang/bun-bin for a stable installation.
